query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(saleDate, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM sales 
WHERE saleDate >= '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(saleDate, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month DESC;
